title: Erythrodes rariflora

The classification of Erythrodes rariflora is within the genus Erythrodes and the subfamily Aeridinae. The genus Erythrodes is part of the larger family Orchidaceae. Further classification places Erythrodes rariflora under the family Orchidaceae, and the subfamily Aeridinae, and the tribe Vandeae.
